/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/baseScreen.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/baseScreen.dir/baseScreen.cpp.o -o baseScreen  _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-dom.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-component.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-dom.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a
